# victoriametrics_resource

## Purpose

VictoriaMetrics connection resource — exposes the base URL + auth helpers for read (`/api/v1/query[_range]`) and write (`/api/v1/import/prometheus`, `/api/v1/write`) endpoints.

<!-- FIELDS:START - auto-generated by tools/regen_readme_fields.py -->

## Fields

### Required

| Field | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `base_url` | `str` | VictoriaMetrics base URL (e.g. http://localhost:8428). |

### Connection

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `resource_key` | `str` | `"vm_resource"` | Resource key. |

### Execution

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `timeout_seconds` | `int` | `60` | — |

### Other

| Field | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `bearer_token` | `str` | — | Bearer token (literal). Set this OR bearer_token_env_var. |
| `bearer_token_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with bearer token. |
| `basic_user` | `str` | — | Optional HTTP basic auth user. |
| `basic_password_env_var` | `str` | — | Env var with HTTP basic password. |

<!-- FIELDS:END -->

## Example YAML

```yaml
type: dagster_community_components.VictoriaMetricsResourceComponent
attributes:
  resource_key: vm_resource
  base_url: http://localhost:8428
```
